title: Enterprise Development Program (EDP)
summary: Comprehensive entrepreneurship training program designed to equip aspiring entrepreneurs with the skills and knowledge needed to start and grow successful businesses.
description: The Enterprise Development Program (EDP) is our flagship initiative, delivering an intensive, two-month training program that can be fully customized to meet the unique needs of organizations and individuals. Covering business planning, financial management, marketing, and operations, the EDP combines practical training, one-on-one mentorship, access to resources, and networking opportunities to help participants turn ideas into sustainable, high-impact businesses. In partnership with the Universal Outreach Foundation (UOF), we have successfully run 7 distinctive cohorts of the Strive Business Development Program (SBDP), training over 285 ideators, entrepreneurs, and MSME owners, mentoring 199 businesses, and launching 27 new enterprises. Our SBDP Growth Accelerator Program, now the 8th cohort, continues this legacy of transforming ambitious ideas into thriving ventures. Whether you are looking to empower your team, scale your business, or apply as an aspiring entrepreneur, the EDP delivers measurable results that create lasting impact.
impact: Over 500 entrepreneurs trained, 150+ businesses launched, 300+ jobs created

title: Integrated Professional Skills Development Program (IPS-DP)
summary: A holistic professional development program that combines technical skills training with essential soft skills for career advancement.
description: Since 2019, we have trained over 1,850 students, youth, emerging leaders, and professionals, equipping them with practical skills in project management, procurement, project proposal writing, monitoring and evaluation, report writing, and financial management. The Integrated Professional Skills Development Program (IPS-DP) is designed to prepare individuals for success in today’s competitive job market. Participants gain expertise in project management, communication, leadership, digital literacy, and industry-specific technical skills, while working on real-world projects and receiving personalized career coaching. Whether you are an organization looking to upskill your team or an aspiring professional seeking career-ready competencies, the IPS-DP delivers measurable outcomes, building capable, confident, and market-ready talent.
impact: 400+ professionals trained, 85% career advancement rate, 250+ job placements

title: Green Innovation Program (GIP)
summary: Empowering entrepreneurs to build sustainable businesses that address environmental challenges while creating economic value.
description: The Green Innovation Program (GIP) empowers entrepreneurs and professionals to develop sustainable, environmentally responsible businesses. Participants gain practical skills in renewable energy, waste management, sustainable agriculture, and eco-friendly product development, while accessing green technology resources and personalized mentorship. The program also connects participants with sustainability-focused investors and strategic partners, helping them scale innovative solutions that create economic value and environmental impact. Whether you are an organization seeking to build a green workforce or an entrepreneur aiming to launch eco-friendly ventures, the GIP delivers measurable outcomes and fosters high-impact, sustainable businesses.
impact: 200+ green businesses launched, 100+ environmental projects, significant waste reduction

title: STRIVE Business Development Program (SBDP)
summary: Comprehensive support program for existing small businesses looking to scale and achieve sustainable growth.
description: STRIVE provides established small businesses with the tools, knowledge, and support needed to scale effectively. The program includes business diagnostics, growth strategy development, financial planning, marketing support, and access to funding opportunities. Participants receive ongoing mentorship and join a network of successful entrepreneurs.
impact: 300+ businesses supported, average 150% revenue increase, 400+ jobs created
